extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each category: I counted only the Against rows, namely 6 criminal, 5 tax and 4 statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company, with zero against subsidiaries; I excluded all By rows and promoter/director/KMP/SMP matters from the aggregate amount. The quantified amount against the Company and subsidiaries is the table’s stated aggregate of ₹5,882.43 million, which converts to ₹588.243 crore; no amount against subsidiaries is shown. The contingent-liability table is dated September 30, 2025 and lists GST dispute ₹142.91 million, landowner dispute ₹72.00 million and income tax dispute ₹5,720.69 million; as no Total row is shown, these components sum to ₹5,935.60 million, or ₹593.56 crore. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue concentration percentage is disclosed; the disclosed percentages concern geographic seller concentration and therefore are not used. The source monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
